chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2249 of 2024 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.10211/2024 2. For hearing of main case 25.09.2025 Mr. Ahmed Ali Hussain, advocate for the petitioners Syed Ahsan Ali Shah, advocate for respondent Nos.2 to 5 M/s. Akhtar Hussain and Dr. M. Shahrukh Shahnawaz, Advocates for respondent No.6 Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General Per learned counsel, the order impugned shall be contested before the competent authority, however, learned counsel seeks that the petitioners be permitted to raise every defence available thereto, including that of jurisdiction, and that the matter be adjudicated after providing an opportunity of hearing to the petitioner vide speaking order and during the pendency no further coercive action be taken there against. Learned counsel for the respondents articulate no cavil to the aforesaid and submit that the petition may be disposed of in the above terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge B-K Soomro
